verses.text: Hih thu khit ciangin Moab mite leh Ammon mite, leh Meunim mite pawlkhat, Jehoshafat a sim dingin hong kuan uh hi
Mi pawlkhat hong pai-in Jehoshafat kiangah, “Tuipi galkhat, Edom gam panin mihon tampi khat nangmah a sim dingin hong kuan uh hi. Amaute Hazazontamar (Engedi a kici)-ah om uh hi,” ci-in a gen uh hi
Tua ciangin Jehoshafat lau a, amahmah in Topa' lamlahna ding zong a, Judah gam khempeuhah an tan' ding thu a zasak hi
Tua ciangin Topa' tung pan huhna a ngen dingin Judah mite hong kikhawm uh hi. Judah khuapi khempeuh panin Topa thu a dong dingin amaute hong pai uh hi
Tua ciangin Topa' biakinn huangsung, inntual thak mai, Judah leh Jerusalem-te' kikhopna sungah Jehoshafat ding a

“ Topa, ka pu ka pate uh Pasian aw, nang, vantungah Pasian hilo na hi hiam? Minamte' kumpi gam khempeuh tungah nang a uk hilo na hi hiam? Na khutsungah vangliatna leh thahatna om a, kuamah in nang hong nang zolo hi
Kote' Pasian aw, hih gamah a teng mite na mi Israel-te' mai-ah hawlkhia-in, na lawmpa Abraham' suanlekhakte tungah a tawntung dingin pia hilo na hi hiam
Hih gamah amaute tengin, nangma min dingin hih lai-ah biakinn khat lam uh a

‘Eite tungah siatna, namsau, thukhenna, ahih kei leh natna, ahih kei leh kialpi hong tun' leh, hih biakinn sungah ama min om ahih manin hih biakinn mai-ah dingin i gimna hunah ama tungah i kiko ding a, amah in hong za-in hong hon' ding hi,’ ci uh hi
“Tu-in en in, Egypt gam panin Israel-te hong paikhiat lai-in na simsak loh, amaute in a suksiatloh uh Ammon mite leh Moab mite leh Seir Mual gam mite
ka luah dingun kote tungah nong piaksa nangma neihsa panin kote a hong hawlkhia dingin hong paina tawh amaute in kote hong lehthuk zawsop uh hi

Kote' Pasian aw, amaute tungah thu khenlo ding na hi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh kote a sim dingin a hong pai hih mihon tampite a do dingin thahatna ka nei kei uh hi. Ka cihna ding uh ka thei kei uh a, nangmah bek kong mitsuan uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua laitakin Topa' mai-ah Judah mi khempeuh a taneute, a zite, leh a naupangte uh tawh a ding uh hi
Tua ciangin a kikhawmte' lak, Levi mi Asaf' suante sung pan Mattaniah, a tapa Jeiel, a tapa Benaiah, a tapa Zekhariah, a tapa Jahaziel tungah Topa' kha hong tung hi

Tua ciangin amah in, “Judah gam khempeuh leh Jerusalem-a teng khempeuh, leh Kumpi Jehoshafat aw, ngai un. Topa in hih bangin note' tungah hong gen hi: ‘Kihta kei un la, hih a tam mi honpi hangin lungkia kei un; bang hang hiam cih leh galdona pen note-a' hiloin Pasian-a' ahi hi
Zing ciangin amaute a do-in paisuk un. Ziz kahtohna lampi tawnin amaute hong kuanto ding uh a, Jeruel gamlak nisuahna lam kuam mongah amaute na mu ding uh hi

Note in hih kidona-ah na do ding uh kisamlo hi. Judah gam mite leh Jerusalem khuamite aw, na pan'mun uh la-in taangloin ding un la, note' tangin Topa' gualzawhna mu un,’ ci hi. Kihta kei un la, lungkia kei un. Zing ciangin amaute a do-in pai un. Topa in note hong ompih ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Jehoshafat in a maitang leilam ngatin kun a, Judah gam leh Jerusalem-a a teng mite khempeuh zong Topa' mai-ah pukin Topa a bia uh hi
Tua ciangin Levi mite sung pan Kohath mite leh Korah mite, awging pha mahmah tawh Israel Pasian, Topa a phat dingin a dingto uh hi

Tua ciangin zingsangin amaute tho baihin Tekoa gamlakah a paikhia uh hi. Amaute a paikhiat laitakin Jehoshafat dingin, “Judah gam leh Jerusalem-a a tengte aw, ka thugen za un! Topa na Pasian uh um un; tua hi leh note na kip ding uh hi. Ama kamsangte um un; tua hi leh na mavang ding uh hi,” a ci hi

Amah in mite tawh thu kikupna a neih khit ciangin, galkapte mai-ah amaute a paikawmin, “ Topa tungah lungdamna ko un; bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi,” ci-in biakna puan silhin Topa tungah la sa-in amah a phat dingte a seh hi
Amaute in la sa-in phat ding a kipat uh ciangin, Judah mite a sim dingin a hong pai Ammon mite, Moab mite, leh Seir Mual gam mite a pangsim ding Topa in koih a, amaute kizo hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Ammon mite leh Moab mite in Seir Mual-a a tengte a do dingin kipanin amaute susia mang uh a, Seir-a a tengte a beisak khit uh ciangin amaute khatlekhat kisusia uh hi
Gamlaka galvilna tausangah Judah-te hong tun' ciangin mihonpite' omna lam en uh hi. Amaute pen leilakah a puk misi luanghawm vive na hi a, a suakta kuamah omlo hi

Van kinusiate a tawm dingin Jehoshafat leh a mite hong pai ciangin bawngte, vante, puante, leh na manphate tampi tak mu uh a, a puakzawh nawnloh ciangdong uh amau-a' dingin a la uh hi. Van kinusiate tam mahmah ahih manin ni thum sung tawm uh hi
A ni li ni-in Berakah Kuam-ah amaute kikhawm uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in tua lai-ah Topa phat uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tuni dongin tua lai mun pen Berakah Kuam kici hi
Tua ciangin Judah mi leh Jerusalem mi khempeuh ciah uh a, Jehoshafat makai-in lungdamna tawh Jerusalem-ah a pai uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh a galte uh hangin Topa in amaute lungdamsak hi
Amaute, harp lasaknate leh laia lasaknate tawh Jerusalem-a Topa' biakinn-ah tung uh hi
Topa in Israel-te' galte a dosakna thu a zak uh ciangin kumpi gamte khempeuh in Topa a kihta uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Jehoshafat' ukna gamsung gamdai hi; bang hang hiam cih leh a Pasian in ama kiimah galdaihna a pia hi.
Tua bangin Jehoshafat in Judah tungah uk hi. Amah in uk ding a kipatin kum sawmthumlenga pha a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmnihlenga sung uk hi. Ama nu' min Azubah hi a, Shilhi' tanu ahi hi
Amah in a pa Asa' gamtat bangmahin Topa' muhna-ah a man na sem hi
Ahi zongin mual dawna biakpiaknate kilakhia lo hi. Mite in a lungsim uhah a pu a pate uh' Pasian ngaihsun nailo uh hi
Tu-in Jehoshafat' gamtatna a omlaite, a patna pan a tawp dongin, Israel Kumpite' Tangthu sunga a kiciamteh, Hanani' Tapa Jehu' Khang Tangthu sungah kigelh hi
Hih thu khit ciangin Judah kumpi Jehoshafat in a gilo-a a gamta Israel kumpipa Ahaziah tawh kipawlna a bawl hi
Tarshish-a pai ding teembawte bawlna-ah amah pawl a, amaute in Eziongebar-ah teembawte a bawl uh hi

Tua ciangin Mareshah khuami Dodavahu' tapa Eliezer in Jehoshafat langpangin thu genin, “Nangmah in Ahaziah tawh kipawlna bawl na hih manin Topa in na bawlsa uh nate susia ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin teembawte kisia a Tarshish-ah pai theilo hi.
